/etc/profile.d/tmux_shell.sh.content:
# This file is managed by puppet
if rpm -q --quiet tmux; then
  if [ "$PS1" ]; then
    parent=$(ps -o ppid= -p $$)
    name=$(ps -o comm= -p $parent)
    case "$name" in (sshd|login) exec tmux ;; esac
  fi
fi
